message:
🐛 Clear marketplace cache on refresh and animate refresh icon (#1578)

- Clear localStorage cache entry on manual refresh so stale data
  never persists across page reloads.
- Animate the refresh icon with a full 360° turn (0.6s) on each
  refresh. Spins continuously while fetching, then completes one
  final turn before stopping.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
